meaning: n.铤而走险的人,蛮勇的人adj.蛮勇的,不怕死的
examples: He was a daredevil when young.
The show's full of daredevil feats.
A new circus is in town, with Siberian white tigers and daredevil bikers.
She is a good reporter and must be a daredevil to do what she has.
"He could sit back and dream up daredevil schemes that other men would hazard, " writes Anwar.
